CustomField.formula: IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Starting_EPCs_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL( Starting_EPCs_High_Risk__c , "Yes")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Ending_EPCs_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL( Ending_EPCs_High_Risk__c , "Yes")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Non_social_homes_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL( Non_social_homes_High_Risk__c , "Yes")), 1, 0) + IF(AND(ISPICKVAL( Measure_types_installed_RAG__c, "Red"), ISPICKVAL( Measure_types_installed_High_Risk__c , "Yes")), 1, 0)
CustomField.label: Stock & Measures - Total High Risk Red
